title: Termination or Ban on Deployment
content:
Notwithstanding the provisions of Sections 1 and 5 of this Rule, in pursuit of the national interest or when public welfare so requires, the POEA Governing Board, after consultation with the DFA, may, at any time, terminate or impose a ban on the deployment of migrant workers.

The POEA Governing Board may, after consultation with the DFA, grant exceptions to the ban or lift the ban.

metadata.source_file: Omnibus IRR of RA 8042 as amended by RA 10022.pdf
